feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: I'll Save You A Seat
entry.summary:
Author: sherrwin

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,446Chapters: 3/4Kudos: 13

Summary: This short story entails CEO Arthur Pendragon and the one that got away: Merlin Emrys. With a Little Twist: Along with Merlin, follows two young boys of his. His tremendous bundles of joy yet bane of his existence. Together, the two boys unintentionally pull the two lost lovers back together in the absolute most bizarre place: An airplanes’ first class cabin.What else could be said in that situation but, “That’s my son!"Who just so happens to grow up with a father like Merlin, one out of the ordinary. Disclaimer: Merlin has his magic solely for the plot however he wont be using it.

entry.title: And Yet
entry.summary:
Author: Underworld765

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,168Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 40

Summary: Rumors say the King of Camelot keeps a demon at his side.They’re not wrong. When a visiting king forgets his place, Camelot is reminded exactly what Merlin is- and exactly who Arthur will choose.

entry.title: Senior Assassin
entry.summary:
Author: irish_fish

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,843Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 9

Summary: “Arthur!” Merlin turned to him with a sunshine-y grin that dimpled his cheeks, “can I help you with something?” Arthur realized he should speak now. “Oh, um, yes. I’m supposed to give you my buy in money and then you’ll give it to your uncle, right?” “You convinced your father, then?” Merlin asked, his smile returning. Arthur chuckled and scratched the back of his now slightly warm neck, “Uh, no actually. He doesn’t know I’m doing this.” Merlin’s eyes flickered down for a second then met his again, “Well, I think that’s great! Um, I’m glad you’re joining us.”

entry.title: Dower the Stars by RurouniHime [Podfic]
entry.summary:
Author: Billyballz

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5Chapters: 3/8Kudos: 4

Summary: During a time of great prosperity in Albion, the Druids offer Emrys a precious gift. Arthur is not amused. (aka, "The Great Conjunction is at Hand, Everyone Kiss Merlin!") Podfic of the amazing work by RurouniHime!

entry.title: [ART] High King of Albion
entry.summary:
Author: schweet_heart

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 0Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 80

Summary: "You're the last person I'd have expected to get emotional about this," Arthur said, catching Merlin's gaze in the mirror with a knowing smile. "It's just a crown, Merlin." "I know it is, you prat," Merlin said, reaching out to make some final adjustments. "But it's the High King's crown now, isn't it?" He sniffed. "And it's crooked." Created for Merthur Glompfest 2026.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: it's not my fire, but was forged in flame
entry.summary:
Author: elfesetamour

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,289Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 29

Summary: Unable to heal from Camelot’s greatest loss, Merlin is haunted by nightmares—or something more sinister—of Arthur. But, despite the undeniable resemblance, it’s impossible that the Arthur in his dreams is the same one he’d held in his arms as he died. Searching through the Mist, Merlin leaves his old life behind in search of a new destiny, which brings him to Paris, 1643. In a land of feuds and a time of revolution, among old faces as well as new, Merlin searches for meaning side by side with Arthur again. But whether he can come to terms with their differences, or accept his feelings for this new Arthur, all the while protecting him, may be a greater challenge than he signed up for. "That was Arthur, standing right in front of him. Yes, he wasn’t completely the same but that was him-no mistake. A scar visible on his cheek, and that beard covering his face couldn’t fool Merlin. He knew Arthur better than that. " Merlin’s magic takes him on a journey through time to Musketeer Era France, where he meets Arthur, the Captain of the King’s Red Guard. Ruthless, bloodthirsty, and emotionally closed off, Merlin seems unable to deny anything this new Arthur asks of him.

entry.title: Cursed Love
entry.summary:
Author: Nukagirl

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,581Chapters: 4/8Kudos: 19

Summary: “I am just about to go get your dinner,” Merlin said, not looking up from his current job, “I’m a bit behind as I was helping Gwen earlier.”Arthur didn’t respond but he walked over to Merlin. Merlin looked up as Arthur was upon him, a look of fury in his eyes. It was too late for Merlin to move as Arthur shoved him back. The armour fell to the ground as Merlin stumbled backwards.“Wha-?” Merlin started to ask but was cut off as Arthur slapped him across the face, his eyes red with anger. Merlin backed away, his hand on his burning cheek, confusion and hurt in his eyes.xArthur has been cursed but the only one that realises is Merlin. Now, he just needs to work out how to break it before Arthur kills him

entry.title: A Hidden Legacy
entry.summary:
Author: Shippeoforever

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 67,871Chapters: 62/67Kudos: 257

Summary: Merthur receives a surprise neither of them expected, turning not only their lives upside down, but also those of everyone around them.Will they be able to find their happy ending, while hiding everything from King Uther with the help of their friends?****Stay tuned to find out and keep reading. It's going to be a multi-chapter story. The number of chapters is unknown yet, but more tags will surely be added soon. So stay tuned for updates.

entry.title: 500 Miles From My Home
entry.summary:
Author: alesha_333

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,881Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 72

Summary: Merlin counts the miles at first. Ten, because he is still able to turn back.Fifty because it finally feels like leaving. He tells himself he will stop. He’ll go back. He doesn’t.The words echo in his mind, the blue in Arthur’s eyes dimming, the flinch at the word traitor. A hundred miles from Camelot, that’s all he needs, right?

entry.title: The Price
entry.summary:
Author: dante0220

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 104,174Chapters: 68/?Kudos: 34

Summary: In the "Wicked Day", Merlin tries to save Uther's life. As Emrys, he tries to cast the healing spell. Unfortunately, Morgana's necklace contains an *extra* twist. As both healing spell and aging spell go wrong, Merlin is forced to flee. Kilgarrah takes him to safety. Mithian and Rodor grant him sanctuary. There Merlin realizes still more about his secondary royal destiny.

entry.title: Princes should not eat
entry.summary:
Author: Ladi_albion

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,419Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 106

Summary: Merlin has been especially irritable since Freya's death and finds the perfect outlet in seeing how he can annoy Arthur by teasing him about his weight and how much the prince eats. But it turns out that Arthur Pendragon is much more susceptible to his servant's opinion than he imagines. And so an eating disorder is born. A modern disease that no one understands and that, to Merlin's despair, may prevent Albion's destiny from never being fulfilled.

entry.title: Wait for Me (I'm coming with you)
entry.summary:
Author: Lilbug2422

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,070Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 44

Summary: Merlin sets off to Ealdor using the excuse of visiting her mother, hiding the true reason behind her trip to herself. However when Arthur and the knights tag along (totally because they have business in that area of the kingdom and NOT because they're worried about Merlin traveling by herself) things get complicated. Merlin doesn't wish to tell them about the real reason she's going to Ealdor, shame of falling to societies expectations of her keeping her mouth sealed tightly. However when the truth gets revealed how will Arthur react to potentially losing his Merlin to those very same expectations? Will he break through his own societal pressures to keep her? Or simply watch her go?

entry.title: there is peace beneath the firth
entry.summary:
Author: theobjectlesson

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,203Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 5

Summary: He pulls Merlin into him, or pulls himself into Merlin, hand to his neck, mouth to his forehead. Desperate to feel something from that mysterious glow. Listening for breath, reaching for a pulse, any sound, any movement besides the indifferent lapping of waves. "Please."

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Just a Little Fun
entry.summary:
Author: THELASTDRAGON

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,487Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 150

Summary: Merlin arrives in Camelot and meets an arrogant, infuriatingly attractive knight. Who he thinks is just some Noble's son who wants to get dicked down by a peasant. While Merlin is happy to play along - nothing in Camelot is ever what it seems—and his simple fun is about to get so much more complicated.
